name: Codebase Index Freshness Check
description: At session start, checks if the codebase collection has documents. If empty or stale, suggests running compass_reindex_folder to update the semantic code search index.

then.prompt: Check compass_status for the codebase collection. If it has 0 documents and the user is working in a project directory, suggest running compass_index_folder to enable semantic code search. If it already has documents, suggest compass_reindex_folder for an incremental update. Only mention this once per session — do not repeat on every prompt.
